title: Balaclava
writer: Boyd Cable, Gareth Gundrey, W.P. Lipscomb
actors: Cyril McLaglen, Benita Hume, Alf Goddard
plot: A British officer is falsely accused of murder by a rival officer, and is dishonorably discharged from the army. He rejoins as an enlisted man and is posted as a cavalryman to the siege of Sebastopol during the Crimean War. He dis...
